local_validation.notes: The first BML compiler image proof returns 24 across Go/Rust/TypeScript. It parses the real BML compiler source, builds a BML-COMPILER-IMAGE node with source/image metadata and parsed counts, writes it to /tmp/bml-compiler-source-image.fkb, reads it back, and proves NodeID identity plus loaded fields. Blueprint scanning reports no unregistered type-99 NodeIDs after registering BML lowerer records and BML-COMPILER-IMAGE. Adjacent BML compiler proofs remain green at 26, 34, 42, 31, and 68.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and production verification. Hostinger auto-deploy is already externally blocked on SSH/SCP reachability to 187.77.152.42.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The BML compiler bootstrap ratchet now has a real source-derived .fkb checkpoint. The checkpoint is metadata-only and recoverable, not yet an executable self-hosted compiler image.
test_flows: cd form && env PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH" ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-compiler-fkb-image-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: The .fkb checkpoint is source-derived and proven but still metadata-only. The executable compiler payload, self-compile proof, and promoted image replacement remain open.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-compiler-fkb-image-proof.fk writes and reads /tmp/bml-compiler-source-image.fkb from the parsed BML compiler source metadata.
form/form-stdlib/bml/bmf-bml-compiler-picture.bml now defines BMLCompilerImageEmitter in high-level BML source.
form/form-stdlib/blueprint-registry.json names the BML lowerer runtime record blueprints and BML-COMPILER-IMAGE; generated bp tables make those names resolvable in Go/Rust/TypeScript.
kernels/BMF_BML_COMPILER_PICTURE.md records the first checkpoint and the next refinement: replace metadata-only image payload with executable compiler payload.
